description_long: This is a square, classic-style table with a broad, flat top and four robust, turned legs. The apron beneath the tabletop features ornate carved floral motifs, adding a decorative touch to its otherwise functional design. The legs are thick and rounded, tapering slightly toward the feet, which are subtly bulbous. The table appears to be constructed from solid wood, painted in a uniform light gray color, giving it a refined and elegant appearance. The surface is smooth and matte, with no visible drawers or additional components. This table would be suitable for use in urban parks, sidewalk cafes, or community gathering spaces.
description: A square, classic-style table with ornate carved floral motifs on the apron and four turned legs, finished in light gray. The surface is smooth and matte, giving it an elegant, refined look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carved floral motif on the apron and two turned legs.
description_view_1: Opposite side view with a similar floral motif, but the carving pattern is slightly different.
description_view_2: Side view with the same decorative apron and two visible legs, mirroring the opposite side.
description_view_3: Rear view with a floral motif on the apron, similar to the front but with a slightly different carving detail.
